CustomField.description: Displays the Subsidiary name without the internal numeric prefix (e.g. "Intapp Ireland Limited" instead of "40:Intapp Ireland Limited"). Used in Conga Composer renewal templates. Created as part of BIZ-80323.
CustomField.formula: IF( CONTAINS(TEXT(Subsidiary__c), ":"), IF( CONTAINS("0123456789", LEFT(TRIM(MID(TEXT(Subsidiary__c), FIND(":", TEXT(Subsidiary__c)) + 1, LEN(TEXT(Subsidiary__c)))), 1)), TRIM(MID( TRIM(MID(TEXT(Subsidiary__c), FIND(":", TEXT(Subsidiary__c)) + 1, LEN(TEXT(Subsidiary__c)))), FIND(" ", TRIM(MID(TEXT(Subsidiary__c), FIND(":", TEXT(Subsidiary__c)) + 1, LEN(TEXT(Subsidiary__c))))) + 1, LEN(TEXT(Subsidiary__c)) )), TRIM(MID(TEXT(Subsidiary__c), FIND(":", TEXT(Subsidiary__c)) + 1, LEN(TEXT(Subsidiary__c)))) ), TEXT(Subsidiary__c) )
CustomField.label: Subsidiary Display Name
